mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CORP_CODE) FROM tb_corp WHERE CORP_CODE REGEXP '^C[0-9]+$'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_corp
AND CORP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwCorpName},'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_corp ( CORP_CODE, CORP_NAME, CORP_NAME2, CORP_NO, CORP_TEL, CORP_FAX, CORP_BOSS, CORP_MAST, CORP_UPTE, CORP_UPJO, CORP_ADD, CORP_PLC, CORP_BIGO, CORP_JAN, CORP_STRT, CORP_GYUL1, CORP_GYUL2, CORP_GUBN, CORP_BMAN, CORP_HP, CORP_CNO, CORP_PWD, CORP_MAIL, CORP_BUSINESS ) VALUES ( #{corp_code}, #{corp_name}, #{corp_name2}, #{corp_no}, #{corp_tel}, #{corp_fax}, #{corp_boss}, #{corp_mast}, #{corp_upte}, #{corp_upjo}, #{corp_add}, #{corp_plc}, #{corp_bigo}, #{corp_jan}, #{corp_strt}, #{corp_gyul1}, #{corp_gyul2}, #{corp_gubn}, #{corp_bman}, #{corp_hp}, #{corp_cno}, #{corp_pwd}, #{corp_mail}, #{corp_business} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_corp SET CORP_NAME=#{corp_name}, CORP_NAME2=#{corp_name2}, CORP_NO=#{corp_no}, CORP_TEL=#{corp_tel}, CORP_FAX=#{corp_fax}, CORP_BOSS=#{corp_boss}, CORP_MAST=#{corp_mast}, CORP_UPTE=#{corp_upte}, CORP_UPJO=#{corp_upjo}, CORP_ADD=#{corp_add}, CORP_PLC=#{corp_plc}, CORP_BIGO=#{corp_bigo}, CORP_JAN=#{corp_jan}, CORP_STRT=#{corp_strt}, CORP_GYUL1=#{corp_gyul1}, CORP_GYUL2=#{corp_gyul2}, CORP_GUBN=#{corp_gubn}, CORP_BMAN=#{corp_bman}, CORP_HP=#{corp_hp}, CORP_CNO=#{corp_cno}, CORP_PWD=#{corp_pwd}, CORP_MAIL=#{corp_mail}, CORP_BUSINESS=#{corp_business} WHERE CORP_CODE = #{corp_code}
